case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS VS. JOHN RUDOLPH et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-10-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS AS TO DEFENDANT RUDOLPH, JOHN DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-20-2009
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-10-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
